name: Non Emergency Transport Inc
principals: Darrell W. Melton BSN RN (CEO/President); listed by source as 'Darrell Nelson (Owner)' likely a typo of Darrell Melton
fleet_size_est: unknown (small NEMT van fleet, ~10-20 vehicles implied by 45 employees)
service_types: NEMT (wheelchair/gurney/ambulatory) for dialysis, medical appointments, hospital discharges, special events; no school-bus or SPED route services advertised
districts_or_customers: Tarrant County and surrounding DFW; Medicaid/Medicare NEMT brokers; private-pay
recent_news: None located (2024-2026). Operating continuously since 1995; NPI registered Nov 2005.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT operator (no school district contracts identified) - poor strategic fit for Summit's school-bus/SPED tuck-in thesis. Could only be a fit if Summit expands into adjacent SPED-to-clinic/door-to-door SPED routes; otherwise pass.

name: MTS Transportation Inc
principals: Meron Wodajo (Owner); Minilik Tessema (President); Veronica Shiferaw (VP)
fleet_size_est: unknown (NEMT vans/sedans/wheelchair vans/stretcher; ~15-25 implied by 35 employees)
service_types: NEMT - ambulatory, wheelchair, stretcher; sedan, shuttle, passenger van, passenger bus; serves seniors, dialysis patients, children with special needs (door-to-door medical, not school routes)
districts_or_customers: DC/Northern VA/MD metro; private-pay and Medicaid NEMT; no school district contracts identified
fit_notes: NEMT operator marketed to families of special-needs children but not a contracted school-bus / SPED route provider. Off-thesis for Summit; only relevant if Summit pursues SPED door-to-door adjacency in NoVa.

name: Pegasus Transit
fleet_size_est: ~15-25 coaches/shuttles (Coach 56-pax, Charter 56-pax, Shuttle 40/20/14-pax; DBE-certified motorcoach fleet)
service_types: Charter, motorcoach, shuttle, group/corporate, athletic team transport, contract shuttle; NOT a contracted school district school-bus or SPED route operator (advertises field trip charters only)
districts_or_customers: Ventura County, LA area, Santa Barbara, Bakersfield; corporate/military/government shuttle, weddings, athletic teams, school field trips; Oxnard SD home-to-school is served by Durham, not Pegasus
recent_news: None M&A-related located 2024-2026; DBE-certified with USDOT.
fit_notes: Family-owned charter/motorcoach operator, not a school-route contractor; limited fit for Summit's home-to-school platform. Could only be a fringe tuck-in if Summit wants Ventura County motorcoach/activity-bus capability alongside an existing yellow-bus depot.

name: Access Mobility Of Arizona Inc
owner_or_parent: Wheelers Accessible Van Rentals (Smith family; same ownership group)
principals: Tammy Freeland Smith (Owner/Manager); Ron Smith (founder, Metrocare/Wheelers)
fleet_size_est: 100+ accessible vans across 13 states (Wheelers network); AZ subsidiary is a small portion
service_types: Wheelchair-accessible van RENTALS (self-drive daily/weekly/monthly); NOT a school-bus or student-transportation operator. Affiliated legacy Metrocare provided NEMT.
districts_or_customers: Retail/private renters and disability community; no school district contracts
recent_news: Brand refresh announced; no M&A located.
fit_notes: NOT AN OPERATOR - this is an accessible van rental business (self-drive), not a contracted student/school-bus transportation provider. Off-thesis; remove from Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Silver Lining Transport
owner_or_parent: independent (legal entity: CTC Triad, Inc. dba Silver Lining Transport)
principals: Lisa Reed (Manager per BBB); Allen Maroun / 'Allan Mourn' (General Manager per source list)
fleet_size_est: unknown (NEMT van fleet; ~10-20 implied by 30 employees and 3 Sacramento-area locations)
service_types: NEMT for seniors and individuals with disabilities; ambulatory, wheelchair, gurney; Medicaid/Medi-Cal NEMT. No school-bus or SPED home-to-school route services identified.
districts_or_customers: Sacramento metro (West Sacramento, McClellan, North Highlands); Medi-Cal beneficiaries and senior services
recent_news: None M&A-related located 2024-2026; BBB rating C+ due to unresponded complaints (not accredited).
fit_notes: NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Poor fit for Summit's home-to-school/SPED platform thesis. Note: the FMCSA USDOT 4375000 'Silver Lining Transport LLC' is a different entity in SC (general freight, 1 truck) - do not conflate.
